source: OLD scripts/generate_sequences.py (seq_type='all', seq_len=20, stride=3, future_offset=30, tol=2)
note: Exact integer label counts read from the legacy sequences_{split}.pkl. The PIE 'all' path is deterministic (sorted iteration, no RNG) and labels are integers, so parity is EXACT equality, not float tolerance. Regenerating any split that changes these counts is a behavior break (flag it).
